title: 您想吃什么？
titleTranslation_en: What Would You Like to Eat?
description_uz: «Ofitsiant, taom buyurtma qilmoqchiman.» — restoranda mijoz va ofitsiant o'rtasidagi suhbat. Bu dialog menyu so'rash, taom achchiqligini so'rash, buyurtma berish va ichimlik tanlashni mashq qiladi. Restoran uchun eng foydali so'zlar — takrorlab o'rganish uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Официант, я хочу сделать заказ.» — разговор клиента и официанта в ресторане. Диалог тренирует, как попросить меню, спросить об остроте блюда, сделать заказ и выбрать напиток. Самая полезная лексика для ресторана — идеально для повторения.
description_en: «Waiter, I'd like to order.» — a chat between a customer and a waiter at a restaurant. This dialogue practices asking for the menu, asking if a dish is spicy, placing an order, and choosing a drink. The most useful restaurant vocabulary—perfect for repetition.

sentences.pinyin: Fú wù yuán, wǒ yào diǎn cài.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, nín xiǎng chī shén me?
sentences.text_translation_en: Sure, what would you like to eat?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Zhè ge cài là bu là?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Yǒu yì diǎn là, dàn shì hěn hǎo chī.
sentences.text_translation: Bir oz achchiq, lekin juda mazali.
sentences.text_translation_en: A little spicy, but very tasty.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那我要这个，还要一碗米饭。
sentences.pinyin: Nà wǒ yào zhè ge, hái yào yì wǎn mǐ fàn.
sentences.text_translation: Unda men buni olaman, yana bir kosa guruch.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда я возьму это и ещё миску риса.
sentences.text_translation_en: Then I'll have this, and a bowl of rice too.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de. Nín hē shén me?
sentences.text_translation_en: Alright. What would you like to drink?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: I'll have a cup of tea.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hái xū yào bié de ma?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Zài yào yí ge shū cài.
sentences.speaker: A
